query: Alien Romulus sequel pre-production underway Fede Alvarez June 2025

{"query":"Alien Romulus sequel pre-production underway Fede Alvarez June 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":920,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.fangoria.com/alien-romulus-sequel-filming-date/","title":"Rejoice! The ALIEN: ROMULUS Sequel Begins Filming This Year","content":"In fairness, it was confirmed late last year that a sequel to Alien: Romulus was in development at Disney’s 20th Century Studios.
Now though, we have word from Alvarez directly that things are moving right along, with filming on the sequel set to begin surprisingly soon.
Though virtually no other details were confirmed, Alvarez did reveal on a recent episode of the Marea Nocturna podcast that pre-production is underway on the next Alien movie, with filming set to begin in October.
We can pretty safely assume that Cailee Spainy’s Rain and David Jonsson’s Andy will be involved.
Not bad for a movie that was supposed to go directly to Hulu.
That being the case, it’s not hard to imagine that Disney would want to get a sequel moving sooner rather than later.
Either way, both franchises appear to be thriving at the moment, with the animated Predator: Killer of Killers arriving on Hulu, with the Alien: Earth TV show arriving later this year."},{"url":"https://www.avpgalaxy.net/alien-movies/alien-romulus-2/","title":"Alien: Romulus 2 - Release Date, Cast, Plot & Rumours","content":"Fede Alvarez has confirmed he won’t be directing the film, but he has written the script with his writing partner, Rodo Sayagues.
Fede Alvarez mentioned in June 2025 that he and his co-writer Rodo Sayagues are currently writing the script and think the film will be in pre-production by October 2025.
In September 2025, Fede Alvarez confirmed he won’t be directing the film, and he and Ridley Scott are searching for a director.
No cast members have been confirmed yet, but it is expected that Cailee Spaeny and David Jonsson will reprise their roles as Rain and synthetic Andy.
In January 2025, Alvarez spoke to Empire about where they could go with the film.
In April 2025, a rumour surfaced that a Predator would appear in the film.
Alvarez did actually hint that this would be a possibility earlier in the year when he was talking about possible Alien vs Predator concepts."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/film/news/alien-romulus-sequel-fede-alvarez-not-returning-1236509609/","title":"'Alien Romulus' Sequel: Director Fede Alvarez Not Returning","content":"Fede Alvarez, who reinvigorated the “Alien” franchise on the big screen last year with “Alien: Romulus,” won’t be returning for the sequel, he revealed.
Speaking to TooFab, Alvarez said he will stay on as a producer for the “Alien: Romulus” sequel, but he and franchise creator Ridley Scott will search for a new director.
“We just finished the script, actually, for a sequel for ‘Romulus.’ But I’m going to pass the torch on this one as director,” he told TooFab.
Filmmakers come, you make one and you pass the baton to the next one,” Alvarez said.
Alvarez revealed earlier this summer that he was in pre-production on the sequel and filming was expected to begin in October."}]}

It’s an exciting time to be a fan of the *Alien* series, considering we have a TV show on the way in the form of *Alien: Earth,* and a sequel to last year’s fun reinvention of the franchise,*Alien: Romulus*. While appearing on the *Marea Nocturna* podcast, Alvarez has revealed that pre-production on a *Romulus* sequel is ramping up and he plans to be shooting the film by October. **Read more: Alien: Romulus | As the sequel is confirmed, a look at where it could go next**.","score":0.80844593,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://x.com/FANGORIA/status/1930756294484672711","title":"ROMULUS, with filming set to begin in the fall.","content":"Director Fede Alvarez has confirmed that he's currently in pre-production on his follow-up to last year's ALIEN: ROMULUS, with filming set","score":0.80014634,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.05,"request_id":"4e4922f9-ffc2-4546-9559-165786795740"}
